feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Integration Suite
feed.subtitle: SAP Integration Suite Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Trial Integration Suite in Singapore has deployment issues when using security material
entry.content:
Hi,

Since the past two days I've had problems with deployment of integration flows that uses security material.

Even a simple flow using basic authentication HTTP request-reply fails to deploy. The error returned is:

[CONTENT]
[CONTENT_DEPLOY]
[ErrorUnresolvedDependency] : 
{
    "message": "ERROR",
    "childMessageInstances": [
        {
            "message": "EXCEPTION",
            "parameters": [
                "java.util.concurrent.TimeoutException"
            ]
        },
        {
            "message": "UNRESOLVED",
            "parameters": [
                "(&(keystore=default)(objectClass=com.sap.esb.security.KeyCertificateAccessor))"
            ]
        },
        {
            "message": "UNRESOLVED",
            "parameters": [
                "(objectClass=com.sap.esb.camel.http.ahc.configurer.AHCConfigFactory)"
            ]
        }
    ]
}

The tenant I use is in a newly created trial subaccount hosted in Singapore on Azure.

Is anyone else experiencing the same problem?

Best regards,
Jacob

entry.title: Filter expression in SAP ARIBA
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am trying to query Ariba API with a filter expression from CPI via HTTP but getting 400 error - FILTER EXPRESSION INVALID. Without Filter it is working fine.

Could you please suggest what would be the correct format ?

ARIBA API : https://mn2.openapi.ariba.com/api/sourcing-approval/v2/prod/changes

Query: limit=9999999&realm=theredsea-T&$filter=changeSequenceId%20eq%20'270'

           limit=9999999&realm=theredsea-T&$filter=changeSequenceId%20eq%20270

changeSequenceId coming when trying without Filter

entry.title: Linking User entity and Position
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am new to SAP CPI, we have a requirement to update a custom field in position entity using the value from a user entity ie bench strength.

How to link both entities as Position has same user multiple times.

How to pick position entity with user linked and latest enty.

Any leads would be welcome.

entry.title: I need to use custom rap api in intgeration suite but i am getting error when loading the metadata
entry.content:
this is the error i am getting how to achieve this.

I need to use the api that is created in abap cloud in the integration suite but when i am accessing the metatdata in the odata v2 entity selection i am getting this error.

thanks in advance

entry.title: How to Add a New Segment to Message Type MDM_EQUIPMENT_SAVEREPLICA Without an Extension?
entry.content:
I need to add a new segment to the IDoc message type MDM_EQUIPMENT_SAVEREPLICA with basic type MDM_EQUIPMENT_SAVEREPLICA01. However, this message type does not allow extensions - “Action is not possible for generated IDoc types” (I guess because this is a standard message type and cannot be changed/edited).

This message type is outbound and is triggered when an equipment change occurs in SAP, creating a change pointer that later generates an IDoc.


What I Have Tried

1.Since I cannot use a standard extension, I manually added the segment by modifying the function module ALE_EQUIPMENT_SAVEREPLICA, which is responsible for IDoc creation.

2.I created a custom segment in WE31 (ZE1BP_IEQM_GWLEN) and populated it inside ALE_EQUIPMENT_SAVEREPLICA:

 

3.Issue:

•The segment appears correctly inside the generated IDoc with the correct data.

•However, when I modify the equipment data and reprocess the IDoc, I get IDoc status 26 (Syntax Error in IDoc).

•The error only appeared after I made changes to the equipment data, suggesting that the system is validating the IDoc structure and rejecting the new segment.

Questions

1.How can I properly add a new segment to this message type if I cannot use an extension?

2.Is there a way to modify the IDoc structure dynamically to allow this new segment?

3.Should I create a completely new message type for this? If yes, what is the recommended approach?

4.Is there an alternative method to add this field without modifying the existing message type?

 

I appreciate any insights or recommendations on the best way to handle this scenario. 🚀

entry.title: JSON to XML Conversion Namespace in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi All, I have developed an IFlow to convert JSON to XML and made Message mapping using WSDL(Imported both at source and target; All fields are One-to-One Mapping) which I have attached here.

JSON to XML Configuration:

 

Facing below error while testing with the JSON Payload(Attached here).

Anyone explain how to resolve the issue.

Thanks.

entry.title: Binary Attachment file through Form-Data not working in sap cpi
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working on a scenario where ServiceNow is sending attachment(any format img/pdf/ppt/.xls etc) in Base64 format to SAP CPI. SAP CPI decoder used and converted to binary format which needs to be sent to JIRA Api which accepts form data. 

While triggering the same binary file(taken from Trace) from POSTMAN it is posting successfully and the attachment is displayed in expected format. But the same thing is giving 500 Error from SAP CPI.

 

 

 

 

 

The flow is mentioned below where I am using the decoder to convert to binary. Setting multi-part header through Content modifier but it is not working.

I tried using the groovy scripts from the below two blogs to solve my issue but no luck.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sap-cpi-forwarding-raw-image-data-through-integration-flow/qaq-p/11936736

Error Details 

Please guide me how can this be resolved.

Thanks.

Best Regards,

Nidhi Srivastava

entry.title: Provisioning SAP S/4 HANA data to powerBI
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have requirement to expose SAP S/4 HANA supplier data to a receiver system (Power BI) for analytics purposes ... Could you please guide me on possible options? Can we use OData provisioning capability with SAP Integration Suite ? or do we really need SAP Integration Suite or is there direct connection possible from S/4 HANA to power BI? If data is required for analytics purposes is there some other options and can be consumed as a data product from there? Thank you!

Regards

Ramu

entry.title: SoapFault:faultstring=Error reading XMLStreamReader: Unexpected character
entry.content:
Hi Expert

I’m facing an issue while working on a SOAP web service call in my ABAP program, and I’m seeking your guidance.

Error Details:

During the execution of the web service, I encounter the following error:

Scenario:

  • Web Service Type: SOAP
  • Proxy Class: Used for calling the service in ABAP.
  • Payload: Sent from the ABAP program using a generated proxy class.

The error seems to suggest that the response or request payload contains invalid characters or is not properly formatted XML. This happens when sending the SOAP request to a CPI endpoint.

What I’ve Checked So Far:

  1. Payload Structure:

    • Ensured the payload has the correct SOAP envelope and namespace definitions.
    • Verified all required fields are populated.

  2. CPI Logs:

    • Checked logs in SAP Integration Suite (CPI) and observed issues during payload processing.

  3. Proxy Configuration:

    • Verified endpoint, authentication, and proxy configurations in the ABAP program.

  4. Request Validation:

    • Used HTTP tools (Postman , soapUI) to send the same payload, and it worked as expected, pointing to an issue in the ABAP-generated payload.

 

Any insights or suggestions would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance for your help!

Best regards,
Taher

entry.title: Configure username and password for a SAP PI/PO integration
entry.content:
I have an Integration that was publicly exposed and was carried out in the SAP PI/PO Integration Builder. For the security of this, I need to configure username and password for the SAP PI/PO Integration, it needs to request this data every time someone tries to consume it.

Thanks for the valuable help.

entry.title: AP CPI integration - Query filter conditions and null date&time issue!
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to get business partner list of records that created or modified within specific date and time duration.

Example: get all business partners from system that created between 1-1-2025 10:00AM to 1/2/2025 11:00AM  or last changed on 1-1-2025 10:00AM to 1/2/2025 11:00PM

Notes: -

1. SAP business partners thurogh CPI integration has 4 fields for creation date or updated date:

"CreationDate": "2025-01-20T00:00:00.000",
"Customer": "21600031",
"LastChangeDate": "2025-01-21T00:00:00.000",
"BusinessPartner": "21600031",
"CreationTime": "1970-01-01T11:11:16.000",
"LastChangeTime": "1970-01-01T08:45:20.000",

2. LastChangeDate or LastChangeTime will be null in SAP system unless the record is not changed.

My CPI Query option filter is:

$select=Customer,BusinessPartner,Supplier,CreationDate,CreationTime,LastChangeDate,LastChangeTime&$filter=CreationDate ge datetime'${property.CreationDate}'
and (LastChangeDate ne null) or LastChangeDate ge datetime'${property.LastChangeDate}'

when try to consume the cpi return bad request.

Please support by write the right query option filter in order to get all business partners within a specific creation or updating date&time and ignoring the null last change datetime records.

refer to screenshot.

Thanks.

entry.title: Activating trial Instance Of integration suite hangs on activating Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hi All,
I tried to activate a new trial instance of IS on AWS US. However it hangs on activating the Cloud Integration capability. First it failed and after retrying it nou hangs for long time on 51 %.

Can anybody help me out?

 

Update: The activation failed with the message:
Error T001: Activation of Cloud Integration capability has failed. Please try again later. If the issue persists, learn to solve from integration experts by creating a post in the community fo

 

Thanks in advance.

@SAPSupport Are there any known issues on AWS US East?

entry.title: Replicate Business Partner from SAP S4hana to SAP CPQ extension fields mapping
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am working with the standard integration flow "Replicate Business Partner Relationships from SAP Master Data Integration", which is part of the SAP CPQ - Quote 2.0 Integration with SAP S/4HANA Sales Order package.

Our customer requires the handling of a custom extension field (ZZExtensionField) that exists on both systems (SAP S/4HANA and SAP CPQ).
In the iFlow, this field needs to be mapped to the Customfields structure in SAP CPQ. However, since the standard iFlow does not include a mapping for this field, I need to implement it outside the standard functionality.

Here are some additional details regarding my challenge:

The post-processing step in the iFlow only receives the message payload, and the mapping uses Exchange Properties.
If I want to use these Exchange Properties in the post-processing step, I would need to replicate all standard iFlow requests (e.g., OAuth and Business Partner Get requests) within the post-processing.
Questions:

Is there a way to pass Exchange Properties directly to the post-processing step without replicating all the standard requests?
What is the best approach to enhance the iFlow to handle such a scenario without disrupting the standard design?
Are there any recommended practices or examples for efficiently extending the iFlow for custom field handling?
Any guidance, documentation references, or examples would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: CPI - if function returns multiple values
entry.content:
the if function is returning always the true value and the false value together in the same context, which makes my target structure take the false value (as being the first value).

I could manage the issue with the following udf-script and mapping:

def void conditionalMappingSingle(String[] conditions, String[] trueValues, String[] falseValues, Output output, MappingContext context) {
    // Loop through the conditions and find the first true value
    for (int i = 0; i < conditions.length; i++) {
        if ("true".equalsIgnoreCase(conditions[i])) {
            output.addValue(trueValues[i]); // Add the corresponding true value to the output
            return; // Exit after finding the first true value
        }
    }
    // If no true value is found, add the first false value to the output
    if (falseValues.length > 0) {
        output.addValue(falseValues[0]); // Default to the first false value
    }
}

Using if (standard function)

 

 

using user-defined function:

 

Isn't there a way to solve it with the standard mapping functions?

entry.title: Sending files from different folders/directories at a time through single SFTP sender channel.
entry.content:
Hello SAPians,

I have a requirement where there will be 3 different folders in  AL11. I have to fetch files from these 3 folders at a time and send it to the receiver using SFTP sender channel. I have to send all this files at a time using single sender channel. If not SFTP, pls suggest the correct way.

Thanks in advance 🙂
SAP Cloud Platform, industry edition, client libraries SAP BTP, ABAP environment SAP Integration Suite Cloud Integration SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: Process Integration Runtime Instance gives error - SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi Friends, 

Good day. 

I was able to subscribe and create instances for Process Integration Runtime and Integration Suite in trial account. It was working fine for few days. 

After some time, Integration Suite subscription was failed and followed by Process Integration Runtime. The error message is given below. 

Service broker error: "Service" broker it-broker-rt failed with: "Forbidden": "Your" tenants provisioning status in an illegal state (Active: (undefined), Unsubscribing: (it-cpitrial05)). Please open a ticket on LOD-HCI-PI-PRV

I don't know suddenly what happened to tenant. I could not find any state in Tenant Page. Since this is trial account, I could not open a case to SAP. 

Could you please clarify?

Thank you. 

Regards, 

Jegatheeswaran P.

entry.title: Calling an IFLOW from SOAPUI leads to Error response from SAP Cloud integration
entry.content:
Hi Experts

Trying to call an iflow from SOAPUI but getting following error.

~~~

Fri Jan 24 11:39:24 IST 2025:DEBUG:ParameterizedMessage[messagePattern={}:{} requires authentication with the realm '{}', stringArgs=[.hana.ondemand.com, 443, SAP Cloud Integration], throwable=null]

~~~~

I am using correct Credentials not sure why i am getting this error can someone please throw light.

Thanks in Advance

Vijay

entry.title: UnresolvedDependency - message:EXCEPTIONparameters[java.util.concurrent.TimeoutException] in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm encountering an issue with all the flows in Integration Suite. Even if I try to undeploy or stop all flows and then redeploy everything, after a few minutes, the flows return to an error state, as shown in the image below:

[CONTENT][CONTENT_DEPLOY][ErrorUnresolvedDependency] : {"message":"ERROR","childMessageInstances":[{"message":"EXCEPTION","parameters":["java.util.concurrent.TimeoutException"]},{"message":"UNRESOLVED","parameters":["(objectClass=com.sap.esb.security.TrustManagerFactory)"]},{"message":"UNRESOLVED","parameters":["(objectClass=com.sap.esb.webservice.authorization.supplier.api.AuthorizationSupplierFactory)"]},{"message":"UNRESOLVED","parameters":["(objectClass=com.sap.esb.security.KeyManagerFactory)"]},{"message":"UNRESOLVED","parameters":["(&(keystore=default)(objectClass=com.sap.esb.security.KeyCertificateAccessor))"]}]}

I attempted to download all the packages, perform an undeploy, and then reload and deploy them again. The flows remain in a deployed state for a few minutes but eventually return to an error state.

However, the streams are working even though they are in an error state, so I cannot explain the problem.

From the error message, it seems to point to an issue with the keystore, but no changes have been made to the certificate

Does anyone know what might be causing this issue?

Kind regards,
Emanuele.

entry.title: Form-Data Attachment to Rest API - 404 Error
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a requirement where base 64 data was being sent from Sender which was decoded and converted in the binary format to be sent to the receiver, but the receiver is accepting the attachment in form-data format.

PFB the screenshot and script which I used to convert my binary file to byte and added the headers following form-data guidelines. 

Header

 
Error Details
org.apache.camel.component.ahc.AhcOperationFailedException: HTTP operation failed invoking https://XXX.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/issue/SZZ-86/attachments with statusCode: 400

Please suggest, If I am missing some inputs and how can I resolve the same.

Thanks.

Best Regards,

Nidhi Srivastava

entry.title: BTP/Integration Suite Methodologies for synchronous communications from ECC6 system
entry.content:
Hello,

We are running an ECC6 system (basis 750) and connect to many JCO RFC Server integrations with function modules to make synchronous calls to external REST/SOAP API's.  I am beginning to explore BTP/Integration suite to replace these JCO servers, and want to know what methodologies are available or recommended in BTP/Integration suite to mimic the bi-directional functionality of RFC to make a call from ECC6 to BTP and receive the results back from an endpoint?
